CustomMetadata.label: AA-004 - Dynamic SOQL with string concat

values.value: One or more Apex classes use Database.query() combined with string concatenation. Dynamic SOQL built with concatenation is vulnerable to SOQL injection if any concatenated value originates from user input. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
SOQL injection via concatenated user input can allow attackers to bypass WHERE clause filters, extract all records from an object, or cause query errors that leak schema information.
Use String.escapeSingleQuotes() on any user-supplied input before concatenation. Prefer bind variables (WHERE Name = :inputVar) over string concatenation for all user-controlled values.
